SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint

Class AiController

java.lang.Object
com.orasaka.gateway.endpoint.AiController
@Controller public class AiController extends Object
GraphQL Controller that exposes the Orasaka AI capabilities as queries, mutations, and subscriptions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs the controller.

  • Constructor Details

    • AiController

      public AiController(OrasakaAiClient aiClient, IdentityService identityService, ChatStreamService chatStreamService, IdentityInfrastructureProperties identityProperties, org.springframework.core.io.ResourceLoader resourceLoader, OrasakaGraphEngine graphEngine)
      Constructs the controller.
      Parameters:
      aiClient - The core AI facade.
      identityService - The identity service.
      chatStreamService - The streaming chat service.
      identityProperties - The identity config properties.
      resourceLoader - The resource loader.
      graphEngine - The graph engine.

  • Method Details

    • authorities

      @SchemaMapping(typeName="User", field="authorities") public List<String> authorities(User user)
      Schemamapping for authorities list.
      Parameters:
      user - The user.
      Returns:
      The authorities list.

    • me

      @QueryMapping public CompletableFuture<User> me()
      Query me details.
      Returns:
      me details.

    • updatePreferences

      @MutationMapping public CompletableFuture<User> updatePreferences(@Argument Map<String,Object> preferences)
      Mutation updating user preferences.
      Parameters:
      preferences - The map of preferences.
      Returns:
      The user.

    • chat

      @MutationMapping public CompletableFuture<OrasakaChatResponse> chat(@Argument String prompt, @Argument String conversationId)
      Mutation executing chat.
      Parameters:
      prompt - The prompt.
      conversationId - The conversation ID.
      Returns:
      The chat response.

    • chatStream

      @SubscriptionMapping public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<OrasakaChatResponse> chatStream(@Argument String prompt, @Argument String conversationId)
      Subscription streaming chat response.
      Parameters:
      prompt - The prompt.
      conversationId - The conversation ID.
      Returns:
      The stream of responses.

    • register

      @MutationMapping public CompletableFuture<AuthContracts.RegisterResult> register(@Argument String username, @Argument String email, @Argument String password, @Argument String language)
      Mutation performing user registration.
      Parameters:
      username - The username.
      email - The email address.
      password - The plaintext password.
      language - The BCP language tag.
      Returns:
      The registration result.

    • interceptionSchema

      @QueryMapping public CompletableFuture<String> interceptionSchema(@Argument String schemaId)
      Query returning interception schema.
      Parameters:
      schemaId - The schema ID.
      Returns:
      The interception schema JSON string.

    • resolveInterception

      @MutationMapping public CompletableFuture<Boolean> resolveInterception(@Argument String interceptionType, @Argument String schemaId, @Argument Map<String,Object> responses)
      Mutation resolving an active interception.
      Parameters:
      interceptionType - The type of interception.
      schemaId - The schema ID.
      responses - The inputs responses map.
      Returns:
      Resolves to true on success.

    • image

      @MutationMapping public CompletableFuture<OrasakaChatResponse> image(@Argument String prompt)
      Mutation generating image.
      Parameters:
      prompt - The image prompt.
      Returns:
      The image URL response.

    • speech

      @MutationMapping public CompletableFuture<OrasakaChatResponse> speech(@Argument String prompt)
      Mutation generating speech.
      Parameters:
      prompt - The speech text prompt.
      Returns:
      The speech URL response.

    • operationGraph

      @QueryMapping public CompletableFuture<OrasakaOperationGraph> operationGraph()
      Query returning Compiled operation graph.
      Returns:
      Compiled operation graph.

      @SchemaMapping(typeName="NodeState", field="type") public String nodeStateType(NodeState state)
      Schema mapping for NodeState type.
      Parameters:
      state - The state.
      Returns:
      The type string.

      @SchemaMapping(typeName="NodeState", field="reason") public String nodeStateReason(NodeState state)

      Parameters:
      state - The state.
      Returns:
      The lock reason.
